description: This file defines HTTP route handlers for Todo CRUD operations and reorder/move actions in a RESTful API. It maps route paths and HTTP methods to controller methods, applies validation middleware, and includes Swagger API documentation annotations. The routes are mounted under the /api/todos prefix and handle operations such as retrieving all todos, fetching by ID, creating, updating, deleting, and reordering/moving todos within columns.

methods.name: getAll
methods.description: Handler to retrieve all todo items grouped by their Kanban column categories (todo, in-progress, done).

methods.name: getColumns
methods.description: Handler to retrieve the list of valid column names.

methods.name: getById
methods.description: Handler to retrieve a single todo item by its UUID.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Handler to create a new todo item with the provided details.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Handler to update specified fields of an existing todo identified by UUID.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Handler to delete a todo identified by UUID.

methods.name: reorderOrMove
methods.description: Handler to move a todo to a different column and/or position within a column.
